# RCSMessage.Content.composingIndicator(_:)

**Case**

A content type for composing indicator content.

## Declaration

```swift
case composingIndicator(RCSMessage.ComposingIndicator)
```

## Working with composing indicators

- **RCSMessage.ComposingIndicator**: A structure that represents RFC 3994 composing indicator content in an RCS message.
